title: Umami Crisp Vesy
description: A low-carb workout delight featuring Umami flavors and a crispy texture from air-frying Tunisian cheese with an optional drizzle of sweet V Sterbottensost for added sweetness.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together all-purpose flour and V Sterbottensost cheese.
Add garlic powder and salt, stirring until evenly combined.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into bite-sized balls or patties.
Place the cheese balls in the air fryer basket and cook for 12-15 minutes, turning halfway through cooking time to ensure even crispiness.
Optional: Drizzle with V Sterbottensost sauce before serving for extra sweetness.
